clusters.title: Technology Stocks Today
clusters.summary: This week, tech investors will be focusing on Nvidia's announcement about its new RTX Spark chip for Windows laptops and desktops, along with Intel's new platform for AI-driven chip design.

stocks.ai_explanation: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company Limited (TSM), known for producing advanced semiconductor technologies. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
Advanced Micro Devices (AMD), a major player in the computer hardware industry. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
ASML Holding NV, a Dutch company specializing in nanoscale lithography systems used in semiconductor manufacturing. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
Intel Corporation, a leader in microprocessors and related components. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
QUALCOMM Incorporated, a telecommunications equipment and semiconductor company. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
